name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Where were you 10 years ago?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
... And where do you want our country to be 10 years from now? PeterTen years ago, the bill that became **Wisconsin's **Act** 10** was introduced in the Legislature.In the ten years since, taxpayers have saved more than **$13 billion **and our reforms have become a model for the rest of the country.**_BUT THE LIBERALS HAVE NEVER GOTTEN OVER THEIR FURY._**** AND WITH JOE BIDEN IN THE WHITE HOUSE, [_WE NEED TO DEFEND ACT 10 - and bring this kind of reform to Washington! _](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mvirdl-ahkdjtlkr-r/)** [Donate $10 for Act 10](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mvirdl-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [$45 - Average WI Donation](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mvirdl-ahkdjtlkr-j/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mvirdl-ahkdjtlkr-t/) As your Congressman, I see every day how out-of-touch big government in Washington is failing real Americans. That's why I asked to be assigned to the House Committee on Education and Labor, to stand up for the people who fought so hard to pass Act 10 and labor reform in Wisconsin - to bring that wisdom to Washington. **~~ There are two directions we can go from here ~~**
* One, we do NOTHING, and watch as **Tony Evers **and the Democrats in Wisconsin get to chip away at our historic reform... and the taxpayer savings we fought so hard for.
* Or TWO, **Wisconsin Conservatives[STAND UP](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mvirdl-ahkdjtlkr-i/) to defend Act 10, and work to bring our successes out to Congress!!**

Please, take a moment to support my campaign in honor of Act 10.-Congressman Scott Fitzgerald [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mvirdl-ahkdjtlkr-d/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mvirdl-ahkdjtlkr-h/) Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress

**FLIP THE HOUSE PETITION:****[We have SEVEN days until the State of the Union Address and so far have collected 59,000 signatures of our 100,000 signature goal, which means today we need 5,714 patriots to step forward in order to stay on track toward meeting our goal by February 23 rd**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57464031:WCCIiQdwN:m:1:2247059263:9E92BF8B1CF02820814046DC2D73C104:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57464031:WCCIiQdwN:m:1:2247059263:9E92BF8B1CF02820814046DC2D73C104:r)
Peter,

The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people. Now, President Biden is replicating the leadership style of Barack Obama: governing by executive order.

In the first week of his presidency Joe Biden signed more than 40 executive orders. For a guy who campaigned on bipartisan compromise, **he's off to a very lousy start**. So much for working with Republicans - or even his own party - in Congress!

**This is just the beginning:** in the coming weeks expect more executive orders, government madidates, economy crushing shutdowns, government spending increases and more.

I'm writing today because we must start now to win a Conservative majority in Congress. **[We only need a few more Conservatives in Congress to put the Democrats in the minority and prevent the Democrat administration from doing more damage to our nation](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57464031:WCCIiQdwN:m:1:2247059263:9E92BF8B1CF02820814046DC2D73C104:r)**.

While the election may not be this month or even this year - **it's imperative we're able to begin the groundwork for a successful campaign cycle. TODAY.**

Before the State of the Union speech on February 23rd, **I've set a goal of identifying[100,000 conservatives](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57464031:WCCIiQdwN:m:1:2247059263:9E92BF8B1CF02820814046DC2D73C104:r) who stand ready and willing to help our team flip the House next November**.

**We have SEVEN days until the State of the Union Address and so far have collected 59,000 signatures of our 100,000 signature goal, which means today we need 5,714 patriots to step forward in order to stay on track toward meeting our goal. **

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57464031:WCCIiQdwN:m:1:2247059263:9E92BF8B1CF02820814046DC2D73C104:r)

Retiring Nancy Pelosi as Speaker and uniting all Conservatives to stop radical legislation from Joe Biden and the far left begins today. **[We're counting on you to join our cause.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57464031:WCCIiQdwN:m:1:2247059263:9E92BF8B1CF02820814046DC2D73C104:r)**

Without control of the House or the Senate, Republicans are inherently at a disadvantage. Right now, we can't block Democrats' pet projects from making their way into COVID relief legislation or stop Biden from halting construction on the Keystone Pipeline.

The American people made it clear in November's election - they elected Conservatives in nearly every close House race in the country. **[Now we must expand the map and take back the majority](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57464031:WCCIiQdwN:m:1:2247059263:9E92BF8B1CF02820814046DC2D73C104:r)**.

We hope you will be among the first to sign up and signal your commitment to return a Conservative majority in the House.

Thank you for your support.

For freedom,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57464031:WCCIiQdwN:m:1:2247059263:9E92BF8B1CF02820814046DC2D73C104:r)
Jim Jordan

| An Evening of Women's Empowerment will take place virtually on March 30, 2021 from 6:00pm CST to 7:30pm CST. The theme this year is "The 2021 Women's Renaissance" and the event promises to empower attendees. With speakers ranging from leaders like Mayor Annise Parker and Emily Cain (Executive Director of EMILY's List) to leaders like Mikaila Ulmer (Founder, Me & the Bees Lemonade) and Shauna Clark (Global & US Chair of Norton Rose Fulbright), this event features numerous renaissance women who blaze trails in business and the community. Attendees will also hear from speakers like Pastor Juanita Rasmus who will inspire them to be "whole" as they pursue their boldest dreams! This event will be hosted in partnership with the Greater Houston Women's Chamber of Commerce, WatchHerWork, Social Mama, Women's Masters Network and the Women's Business Enterprise Alliance. This event is free and open to the public. It has been oversubscribed in the past so make sure to register today! Door prizes will be available, as well!

subject: Return of the earmarks
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/45c44999610e8a4a/1104bdd6e16a513ec3d6b838967d376c/34143) Dear Peter, This week, one of my fears came true: **Democrat leaders are bringing back earmarks.**

Ten years ago, then-Speaker Boehner got rid of earmarks for good – or so we thought. It was a bipartisan priority to eliminate the swampy practice of funding lawmakers’ pet projects in exchange for their support of the priorities of party leadership.

Pelosi and Schumer are bringing it back, which should concern all of us.

Unfortunately, I saw this coming. That’s why I included earmark eliminations in my Roadmap to Congressional Reform last month.

Americans overwhelmingly despise pork barrel spending because we see it for what it is. It enables career politicians and further separates Americans from the lawmaking process. It took the Democrats less than a month in power to betray the American people and bring back earmarks.

Now more than ever, we need lawmakers of integrity, men and women willing to stand up for the American people and not kowtow to party bosses and special interests.

**[Will you help me?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/45c44999610e8a4a/69b19f0d9667098ac3d6b838967d376c/34143)**

We **__must__** take back the majority next fall. We **__must__** elect conservative lawmakers who are committed to getting rid of earmarks, burying them so far that no power-hungry Speaker can ever bring them back.

**[Your donations help me fight back against the progressives](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/45c44999610e8a4a/b7dcbb8c453f1ccfc3d6b838967d376c/34143)** trying to push me out of office and eliminate your voice in Congress. Every dollar helps in the fight to preserve our values and ensure that leftist policies do not destroy everything President Trump and Republican leaders built in the last four years.

I’m honored to serve you in Congress, and I assure you that my vote will always belong to the people of Oklahoma’s First District, not special interests.

Thank you, Kevin Hern [**DONATE NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/45c44999610e8a4a/62a582c4517b45c4c3d6b838967d376c/34143) id:2020-12-15-16:46:59:066t Paid For By Hern For Congress

| Friends,

For the past 45 days, Congress has done nothing except play politics with the future of our great nation. At the White House, President Biden has issued more Excutive Orders in his first 10 days in office than the last seven presidents combined in their first 10 days. To date, there have been over 50 Executive Orders signed since January 20th.

_I am fighting back_. Since I took my oath of office on January 3rd, I have signed on to over 22 Bills that do everything from Protect Life of the unborn to Safeguarding American Energy. I also secured assignments on the House Agriculture Committee and the House Veterans Affairs Committee. Both committees have already started to meet and I am strongly advocating for Kansas Agriculture and our Nation's service members.

In addition to committee work, I introduced six pieces of legislation that would provide more transparency and oversight to Executive Orders coming out of the White House. My legislation would force the Executive Branch to notify Congress and the American People 30 days before a new Executive Order can be signed. It also requires a report to be issued six months after the order is signed and yearly thereafter. These reports will allow the American people to clearly see the impacts of orders that are often signed in the dead of night.

_**My legislation holds the administration accountable in the following areas**_ :

-Agriculture Issues
-Energy Issues
-Naural Resources Issues
-2nd Amendment Issues
-Life Issues
-Immigration Issues

To learn more about specific policy issues or to recieve official updates, you can visit my official website at: https://mann.house.gov

I did not run for Congress to be the caretaker in the slow demise of America - I ran so I could fight and work to make it stronger. That is what I intend to do while believing our brightest days are yet to come.

Please help me continue the fight by supporting my political efforts. I am doing everything I can in Congress to stop the liberal agenda. I am also doing everything I can to make sure Republicans take the majority in 2022. Your [**donation**](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=dace0ed40a&e=a9d1410029) today will provide the fuel I need to keep fighting for a better tomorrow.

Yours in the fight,
Tracey Mann

| Hoosier Republican,

You may have heard this news by now, Connie Lawson has decided to retire as Indiana’s Secretary of State. The Indiana Republican Party wants to thank her for her career of service to our state.
---
| [SIGN CONNIE’S THANK YOU CARD](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=baa43dcc24&e=1acd9bb3d6 "SIGN CONNIE’S THANK YOU CARD")
---
| Connie Lawson will retire as one of the most admired and respected Secretary of State in Indiana history. For nearly a decade, Hoosiers have trusted her judgement and leadership. During her term Indiana has become a national role model in running safe and secure elections. Faced with unprecedented challenges in 2020, Secretary Lawson successfully navigated the pandemic to ensure Hoosiers could safely exercise their right to vote and remain confident in the outcome.

Connie Lawson will be missed in the Statehouse and leaves big shoes to fill - but I know her contributions to our state will not end with her upcoming retirement.

In order to thank her for her dedication to our state, I’m going to send her a list of everyone who signs her Thank You card. [_**Will you please join me in giving her your best well-wishes?**_](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e23733eddc&e=1acd9bb3d6)

Thanks,
Kyle Hupfer, IN GOP Chairman

name: Team Stanton
subject: We haven’t forgotten
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Last weekend the Senate was 10 votes short of convicting Donald Trump for the attack he incited on the U.S. Capitol - which resulted in 5 deaths, over a hundred injured, and lasting damage to our democracy. These are the most serious charges ever brought against a President of the United States in the history of our great nation... and the majority of Americans want to see Trump held accountable for his actions.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZS8M_UKOz122VRGC-Vsn4SeUKzAr8omLxQNW7-KeqPE=/z1ZhJjeOnBdPNGJut72ZFHAZUWr1g1kQxcpxJ_rF3vA=?refcode=X_021021_TrumpSenateHearing_A)
Some brave Republicans joined the bipartisan vote to convict - demonstrating their commitment to justice. However, the majority of the Senate GOP violated their oaths to the constitution they swore to defend above all else and acquitted the former President. Sadly, many Republican elected officials continue to ignore the facts and peddle falsehoods, but we will not.

This is a crucial moment. Now more than ever we must remain engaged and steadfast in our values and stand up against tyranny. No one is above the law in our great country - even a former President. Now is the time to set a new tone and help the country move forward by making sure that we pass crucial COVID relief, bring down the cost of healthcare, create more jobs, and vaccinate Americans. We must continue the hard work we set out to do.

I hope you'll join me!
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZS8M_UKOz122VRGC-Vsn4SeUKzAr8omLxQNW7-KeqPE=/z1ZhJjeOnBdPNGJut72ZFHAZUWr1g1kQxcpxJ_rF3vA=?refcode=X_021021_TrumpSenateHearing_A)

We must continue the hard work we set out to do. I hope you'll join me! Thank you, \-- Team Stanton Paid for by Stanton for Congress Stanton for Congress 4340 E Indian School Rd. name: =?utf-8?Q?Muthoni=20Wambu=20Kraal?=
subject: DNC Updates and Farewell for Now...
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Dear Friends-
Duty. It was not just a word for The House impeachment managers. It was the guiding principle that led them to act with honor and distinction. Once again, for most Republicans in Congress it was something not to act upon but to pass off to others. The Heroes who defended democracy showed us what it meant to faithfully fulfill an obligation at great risk to themselves. Mitch McConnell even acknowledged how successful Democratic House managers were in doing so, yet he failed to act with courage. Some Republicans are rapidly [fleeing](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=1d0c14d9b0&e=d6c5c7d7ec) the party they once called home because they no longer recognize it. As DNC spokesman, Daniel Wessel, told [The Hill](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=fff62847f5&e=d6c5c7d7ec), “If former Republicans are looking for a party with a broad and diverse membership — a party that is working to unify the country and build back better — they need look no further than the Democratic Party.”
---
|
---
| I know the outcome of the trial has been difficult to process. I have needed some time to process the impact of the acquittal as well. As hard as it may be, we must remain determined to walk in the path laid by these giants. People need us to help hold up the morale and remain rooted in the pursuit of deep change. Yesterday was President’s Day and what a difference a year makes! President Biden was focused on providing help for our country. He continues to execute on his [American Rescue Plan](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=b5280ff3f5&e=d6c5c7d7ec), which will deliver a radical difference to communities everywhere—direct relief to working families and puts us on the road to beating the virus. Support for state and local communities is an essential part of this plan, as is getting help to those places that are hurting because of budget shortfalls created by the pandemic. President Biden’s coronavirus relief agenda has strong bipartisan support and a new[ CBS News/YouGov poll](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=842c53b5f2&e=d6c5c7d7ec) found an overwhelming majority of Americans support Congress passing a new economic relief package:
* 83% support a new stimulus bill to help those impacted by the pandemic
* 64% approve of President Biden’s handling of the coronavirus crisis
* 61% approve the overall job Biden is doing as president

In fact, more than 400 mayors[ wrote a letter to congressional leaders](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=34b983fac4&e=d6c5c7d7ec) urging them to take immediate action in passing the American Rescue Plan to give their communities the assistance they desperately need, including many Republican mayors. I know that many of you have been gathering support for President Biden’s plan and doing everything from holding Days of Action to helping with letter writing campaigns to Congress, thank you! Please keep it up and know that you are making a difference. Finally, I have some news to share. I have accepted an opportunity to be a Partner at Newco Strategies--[https://www.newcostrategies.com/](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=cd96f33279&e=d6c5c7d7ec) \--and today will be the last email I send as the DNC National Political and Organizing Director. It has been an honor to work alongside some of the most talented people in our profession. And I would like to take a moment to introduce Mansoor Khadir who has been my right hand. Mansoor will be the primary point of contact for my department in the interim. He is a valued member of my team who is a respected and trusted leader. You can email him at [khadirm@dnc.org](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=d425716659&e=d6c5c7d7ec). Thank you all for your partnership and support! You have been incredible and I look forward to continuing to work with you in and around our movement. My personal email is [muthoni.wambu@gmail.com](mailto:muthoni.wambu@gmail.com) if you wish to reach me in the future. Yours in the Fight, Mũthoni
